---
title: "Mrs. Elphinstone"
---

## Mrs. Elphinstone

### Description

resident in India, giving money

### Biography

References to this lady, resident in India, and inspired by Ann Carter Smith\'s work to give money to the poor of the East End, occur in letters to Carter Smith from 1861.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 30th [1864?][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from April 3d 1862
- Letter from Novr 23d 1861
- Letter from Novr 21st 1861
- Letter from July 3d 1861
- Letter from March 18th 1861
- Letter from March 14th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
